0.title: Pre-career: digital childhood
0.flavor: 1995. CRT phosphor monitor. My first command prompt.

terminal.line4: My first computer. My first 'Hello World'.

1.title: Pre-career late: 90s HTML
1.flavor: GeoCities, Angelfire, nested tables and marquees everywhere.
1.marqueeText: ★ Welcome to my website!! ★ 🚧 Under construction 🚧

2.title: Flash era: gameplay programmer
2.flavor: Flash era 2009. ActionScript, vector banners, arcade gameplay.

4.title: AR/VR: own company + Metrodigi
4.flavor: AR/VR era 2015-18. Holographic panels, spatial depth, AR applied to advertising and training.

5.title: Modern: streaming, QA, frontend lead
5.flavor: Modern era 2022-23. Frontend lead, QA leadership, streaming, QA + AI convergence.

0.alt: Rafael at 11 wearing a Jurassic Park cap, in front of a CRT monitor, command-line era (1995)

1.alt: Rafael as a shaved-head teenager at 17, on a 90s HTML page with marquees and starry background (2001)

2.alt: Rafael at 25 with a shaved head, gameplay programmer in the Flash era, colorful vector banner (2009)

3.alt: Rafael at 29 with a full beard and tousled hair, web 2.0 era designer and team lead (2013)

4.alt: Rafael at 32 with a full beard, AR/VR era with floating cyan holographic panels (2015-2018)

5.alt: Rafael at 38 with a medium beard, modern minimalist era, frontend lead (2022-2023)

6.alt: Rafael at 42 with a distinguished beard, QA + AI convergence era, pixel art space ambient (2026)
